titleStmt.title: SII 19.397: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 397. (A.R. No. 51 of 1918.) VṚIDDHĀCHALAM, VRIDDHACHALAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VṚIDDHAGIRĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift to the temple of Tirumudukuṉṟam-Uḍaiyār by Iruṅgōnār Nāraṇaṉ Prithi[vi*]patiyār, of 6 mā of tax-free land for the daily supply of 4 nāḻi of rice for the evening offering to the god 8 cows for ghee, 90 sheep for a perpetual lamp, a golden fore-head plate, and vessels for keeping the offerings and a lampstand.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripatmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu tirumutukuṉṟamuṭaiyārkkuiruṅ(ka)
koṉār nāraṇan pṛthīpatiyār cantrādityavaṟ vaitta sa�ndhitiruvamitu Oru potaikku
vaitta Arici nānāḻikku ceytukuṭutta Iṟaiyili nilamāvatu cāṟṟukkūṭa
ṟ periyaērikkiḻ vaṭakkiṟṟūmpil kumiḻi varattiṉ ṟeṟkaṭaiya nirnilam kālum Itaṉkiḻ vara
mpaṭainta vāykkālil kiḻakkil Āka Āṟumāvum tiruvamirtaṭṭa tarāccaruva
m niṟai nūṟṟuppattāl 1 Amutu ceyya Iṭṭu cepputtaḷikai niṟai Aimpatiṉ palat
ttāl 1 Aṭṭaṇaikkāl tarā Eṇpatiṉ palattāl 1 veḷḷi māṉayavaṭṭil kācuniṟai kkallāl E
ṇkaḻañce Āṟu mañcāṭiyāl 1 neyamutukkum pacu Eṭṭum Uṭaiyārkku Iṭṭa poṟpaṭṭam
kācu niṟaikkallāl cemmai Eṇkaḻañcu(ḻañcu)m noṉtāviḷakkiṉukku Āṭu toṇṇūṟum
Ivviḷakkeriya Īḻanilaiviḷakkoṉṟum .
Digital edition of SII 19.397 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
